text.title: Fine-tuning (LoRA) — Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure for applying `fine-tuning-lora`. Each step lists input artifact, action, output artifact. Decision gates live in content/06-decision-tree.xml.

step.name: validate-data
step.action: Run validate-jsonl.py; reject if <100 examples or schema violations.

step.name: choose-config
step.action: Walk decision tree; pick variant + r/alpha/lr/epochs.

step.name: train
step.action: Run axolotl/peft training; record loss curve and checkpoints.

step.name: checkpoint-pick
step.action: Choose best checkpoint via eval-set score, not training loss.

step.name: eval-gate
step.action: Run eval-gate.py; require ≥2 task metrics beat baseline AND general benchmark drop <5pts.

step.name: merge-or-keep
step.action: Merge into base only if single-task serving; keep adapter for multi-task swap.
